Airway Feature Explorer

Airway Feature Dashboard

Choose an airway segment and feature type, then enter personal information. The page will automatically calculate BMI and pack-years, and display the predicted value with the age-referenced percentile position.
Pack-years = cigarettes per day / 20 x smoking years.

Age Reference Curves
Blue lines show quantile regression spline curves derived from the Nanjing reference cohort by age and sex. The orange point marks the current predicted or observed value.
